title: 0.58x reduced risk of NHL
summary: 0.58x reduced risk of NHL
detail: The rare minor T allele is protective for NHL in general and subtypes, with a reduction in risk of 0.58x (95% CI .40-.84) p-trend=.0037. Risk reduction is likely greater in very rare TT homozygotes.

title: 0.47x reduced risk for NHL
summary: 0.47x reduced risk for NHL
detail: The rare minor T allele is protective for NHL in general and subtypes, with a reduction in risk of 0.47x (95% CI .04-5.24) p-trend=.0037. Risk reduction is likely greater in very rare TT homozygotes, but the CI is large due to the rarity of this genotype, and the p-trend includes the risk reduction in the more common heterozygotes.
whyItMatters: SNPedia has a genotype-specific page for this result, which can add consumer-facing context alongside primary evidence sources.
